title: Kanban Columns for Subitems Based on Their Own Status

posts.author: Breeze (Bielovtsev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello,
Currently, Kanban columns on monday.com boards are determined only by the status of the main item, not by the status of subitems. This makes it difficult to visually track the progress of individual subitems, especially when managing complex tasks with multiple sub-tasks.

What are you trying to achieve

I want subitems to be able to move between Kanban columns based on their own status, independently from the parent item. This would greatly improve workflow visibility and management for teams that rely heavily on subitems.

Kind regards,
Vitalii

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Breeze, Welcome to the community!

This would be a valuable enhancement for managing subitems more effectively in Kanban views.

Currently, Kanban columns are based on the main item status, so subitems can’t move independently.

As a workaround, if you’re open to it, apps like Multi Board Kanban offer extended Kanban capabilities across subitems and include a free plan you can use if you need this feature for a few boards or subitems.
